summary: Every weekday, sweep the pipeline for deals drifting off-process and surface them as a saved view.

definition.name: Pipeline hygiene scout
definition.description: Weekday-morning sweep: scout queries governed pipeline metrics, reads deal records for missing amounts, dead stages and ownerless deals, and publishes the findings as a saved dashboard view. Read-only by construction.

greenlight.note: This playbook only reads and builds views; it proposes no sends or CRM writes.
